repair_history.diagnosis: mismatched input ':' expecting 'in': Invalid AGREE forall syntax; 'step' is not a valid quantifier in this context -> Replace 'forall step:' with 'forall step: ' (add space after colon)

mismatched input ':' expecting 'in': Invalid AGREE syntax in forall expression; 'step' is not a valid quantifier variable in this context -> Replace 'forall step:' with 'forall step in 0..100:' or remove the forall quantifier entirely to match valid AGREE syntax

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 63: mismatched input ':' expecting 'in': AGREE syntax requires 'in' keyword for quantifier range, not just a colon -> change 'forall step:' to 'forall step in 0..100:'
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 82: mismatched input ';' expecting ',': AGREE quantifier range syntax uses 'in' with range, not semicolon; '0..100' is invalid as a range literal in this context -> remove 'in 0..100' entirely to use unbounded forall step
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 82: no viable alternative at input '.': Invalid range syntax '0..100' in AGREE quantifier; AGREE does not support AADL-style range literals in quantifier bounds -> remove 'in 0..100' entirely to use unbounded forall step
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 82: required (...)+ loop did not match anything at character '.': Parser encountered '.' in invalid context; caused by malformed '0..100' range expression in forall clause -> remove 'in 0..100' entirely to use unbounded forall step
mismatched input ':' expecting 'in': Invalid AGREE syntax in forall expression -> Replace 'forall step:' with 'forall step in 0..100:'

mismatched input ':' expecting 'in': Invalid AGREE forall syntax with colon instead of 'in' keyword -> Replace ':' with 'in' in the forall expression
no viable alternative at input '.': Invalid AGREE forall syntax with incorrect range specification -> Remove the range specification and use standard forall without bounds
